verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lead me, Lord, lead me in Your arms In Your wondrous grace, in Your loving kindness Lead me, Lord, in Your dwelling place In Your righteousness, I’ll follow Your footstep.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lead me, Lord, fix my eyes on You, Mend this earthly thought and fill this empty heart Lead me Lord, all that I need, all that I have, all that I am.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lead me, Lord, to forgive and to give To lend a helping hand to my sisters and brothers Lead me, Lord, to be faithful and meek To serve joyfully and be a blessing to others.
